title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Intel India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Intel India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Intel India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Madurai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Intel India:
Intel India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Intel India!
